song.title: Lord, You Know My Inward Yearnings
song.author: Joy Song
song.lyrics: [V1] .G D Am7 Lord you know my inward yearnings .G D Am7 D Lord, you know my empty searching .G D Am7 How long to free my bitter self .G D Am7 D I try and try - but I know I'll only fail [C] . G Bm7 Lord Jesus, You hear me . C D My heart cries for Your touch . G Bm7 Help me to recieve You . C D I need You so much . G Bm7 C D I lay all aside for the best You have for me|| . C D Lord, soften... . Am D I open... . Am7 D I surrender... . G I love You.
